summary: Frontend-only smoke test for ShareStreakButton (iteration 6). Verified that share-streak-wrap renders under SmartSuggestions on Tasks tab, both share and download buttons trigger PNG download (lumora-streak.png) without crash. No regression detected on streak-badge or smart-suggestions. No console/page errors.
passed: share-streak-wrap is visible on Tasks tab
share-streak-btn click in headless browser falls back to download (filename=lumora-streak.png) — no crash
No .error elements or page errors after interactions
action_items: Minor (non-blocking): bottom-nav tab testids tab-tasks/tab-shopping/tab-metime were not found in DOM — tabs likely use different testid naming. Not part of this iteration's scope but worth standardizing in a future pass.
